title: The Dead Wastelands: Undead Rising
description: This modpack is based on zombie apocalypse. Try to survive
body:
![The Dead Wastelands Undead Rising](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cb0447fa400ca70d06126e12bc548b26d87b10a.png) A world infested with zombies is pretty dangerous, don't you agree? Well, this build is based on that! You are the only survivor in the wasteland, and you must survive without letting the zombies get close to you. Old Minecraft features are gone, now you have stamina, body temperature and a new HP system. I advise you to take care of the base right after spawn, because a crowd of zombies walks at night. It is best to make bunkers, because various natural phenomena are happening now, like tornadoes. Remember how I said that it is better not to let zombies close to you? Well, they can infect you. When hit by a zombie, an "infection" effect appears, which has several phases. I advise you to eat a golden apple after the bite.
With each new day, zombies become stronger and more dangerous. It is better to keep a gun with you, because their blow becomes more painful, and HP - more.
 
                                                                                                                  
![Features of our assembly:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8453f17e15d97623c5693632f08c1856ddf88898.png)


•The assembly has a new HP, endurance and temperature system. Take care of your head and body, because these are important parts of the body!

•In addition to ordinary zombies, the assembly now has mutants, mutants - stronger zombies, capable of lifting you up with one blow.

•Various natural phenomena have been added: tornadoes, sandstorms and others.
And also added various mods for a better experience.
![Mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94cd6c044d3680e0129b18a008bc72fd186dc181.png)
🚫 You can not worry about other mobs: with the help of the "Bad Mobs" mod, we removed them.
                               
🖼️ New seasons are added to the world by the mod "Serene Seasons", better leave warm clothes for winter.
 
 🔫New weapons, both firearms and melee, have been added by the mods "[TaCZ] Timeless and Classic Zero" and "Zombie Survival Kit".

Good luck in your survival, traveler!
